title: Metric
description: Definition of a measure applied to systems, including when and how. v0.2 — adds maturity_level (L0-L5) and scale_level (per docs/framework/03 §22, §4).

status.description: Lifecycle. `bootstrap-stub` is the bulk-import state (rubric is a placeholder, applicability is provisional). `proposed` is hand- or scout-authored awaiting review. `canonical` is review-validated. `deprecated` is retained for history.

scale_level.description: What level of description the metric applies to. `micro` — components/agents. `meso` — modules/communities. `macro` — system as a whole. `multi-scale` — explicitly defined to operate across levels (Bar-Yam complexity profile, scale-dependent variance). From docs/framework/03 §4.

maturity_level.description: Maturity ladder from docs/framework/03 §22. L0 qualitative tag; L1 ordinal score (e.g. 0-5); L2 direct numeric measurement; L3 computed from data/model; L4 validated predictive metric; L5 cross-domain invariant candidate. Bootstrap stubs typically sit at L0 or L1 until rubric and worked examples are added.
